final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a road trip scene on Route 66 with a red convertible car (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "复古美式" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1950s–60s American roadside poster illustration tradition, Edward Hopper's open-road oil painting mood, vintage Route 66 travel lithograph print culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal framing with the red convertible as the moving focal point on the road
Subject: must include a red convertible car driving on Route 66, desert landscape on both sides, cacti
Scene/backdrop: must include 66号公路 stretching into the horizon, arid desert terrain, cacti silhouettes flanking the road
Lighting/mood: needs a sunset golden-hour atmosphere with sky drenched in orange-red — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm orange-red dominant direction evoking freedom and open road — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a vintage print surface treatment — exact grain / ink texture / halftone weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
